action.reasoning: Observation: success_rate improved to 0.12 (best so far, is_new_best=true), driven by DoorKey-8x8 (0.98) and FourRooms (0.22); 0.0 on 8 harder envs (KeyCorridor/MultiRoom/Lava/etc). Post-train eval matches (~0.11). Training stable (value_loss~0.001, explained_var~0.99, fps~3420) after 10M steps (~1M/env avg). Analysis: FlatObsWrapper+MlpPolicy+multi-task PPO works for easy navigation but insufficient data/exploration for sparse long-horizon puzzles (task interference likely); 49min/10M allows scaling. Decision: Increase to 25M timesteps (~2hrs, within budget), net_arch=[512,512], lr=3e-4, ent_coef=0.01, gamma=0.995 for longer horizons/better exploration; bump post-eval to n_episodes=5; add simple step-logging to metrics.jsonl for curves; submit_eval immediately after for progress on medium tasks.
